  "decision": "fail",

    "installed-defective"

  "percent_complete": 90,
  "value": 0,

  "confidence": 1.0,

  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Turn-of-nut match marks are absent or have not been rotated, indicating lack of proper pretensioning verification."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Reject the bolted connections under review.",
    "Instruct the installation crew to apply match marks and perform the required turn-of-nut rotation, or verify tension using an approved calibrating device."
  ],
  "rationale": "Under the RCSC Specification, when the turn-of-nut tensioning method is specified, match-marking of the nut and bolt tip is required to verify that the prescribed rotation has been achieved. The absence of these marks or lack of rotation means the structural bolts cannot be verified as properly pretensioned, which is a critical quality gate failure.",
  "references": [
    "RCSC Specification for Structural Joints Using High-Strength Bolts, Section 8.2.1"
  ]
}
